title: Rename a helper function across every call site
task: Rename the function `calcTax` (defined in src/tax.js) to `computeTax`, updating the definition, the export, and every call site across the codebase (it is required from src/invoice.js and src/checkout.js). Behavior must not change and no stray references to the old name may remain. Run the tests to verify.
notes: Both consumer modules are exercised by the suite, so a partial rename breaks npm test; the file_not_contains checks catch a missed call site even if a require was left aliased.
